title: Stir Fry Peppery Beef
description: A flavorful Indian-inspired beef stir fry made with peppery notes and a hint of Ukrainian spice. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: Ukrainian Spice Blend (2 tsp)
ingredients.notes: Or use a mix of paprika, coriander, and cumin

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and bell pepper and cook until they start to soften, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the Ukrainian spice blend and soy sauce (if using) and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the flavors have melded together.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
